image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about placebo control.
Context visual: Placebo controls aren't just tricks; they're essential for testing new treatments.
Escalation visual: In clinical trials, they tell us if a drug works better than a sugar pill.
Evidence visual: Studies show up to 30% of patients can experience real relief with placebos.
Payoff visual: But why does this happen? The brain responds to belief, influencing our health.
Pattern Interrupt visual: Yet, it's not fully understood. Ongoing research is uncovering more.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into the science of the mind? Like and follow for more!
